title: test/e2e: fix flake in login tests and small cleanup
body:
This fixes one flake due incorrect selinux labels.

While at it I thought I might as well get rid of the unnecessary htpasswd and cp commands to speed them a tiny bit.

see commits


#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
Something is weird when I run this locally on main  `make localintegration FOCUS_FILE=login_logout` I see
```
  integration timing results
  Podman login and logout podman login with http{s} prefix              0.311571
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository push with invalid auth.json credentials               0.467294
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout without registry parameter            0.500269
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository pull with wrong auth.json credentials         0.544591
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with flag --authfile          20.217237
  Podman login and logout podman manifest with --authfile               20.242733
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with multi registry           20.262181
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with --tls-verify             20.285268
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout --compat-auth-file flag handling              20.340597
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout               20.342290
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with --cert-dir               20.343255
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository               21.192103
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository and specified image           21.249477
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository with fallback         21.281890
  < Exit [SynchronizedAfterSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /home/pholzing/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/common_test.go:237 @ 06/05/26 13:18:31.782 (102ms)
  << Timeline
------------------------------

Ran 4 of 2515 Specs in 24.879 seconds
SUCCESS! -- 4 Passed | 0 Failed | 0 Pending | 2511 Skipped
```

It clearly run more than 4 tests and it is quite slow.

Running this again on this branch here with the two patches I get a much faster result and the expected 14 tests listed
```
  integration timing results
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository               0.644828
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout without registry parameter            0.675194
  Podman login and logout podman login with http{s} prefix              0.848377
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout --compat-auth-file flag handling              0.989555
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository push with invalid auth.json credentials               1.053238
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository and specified image           1.217100
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository pull with wrong auth.json credentials         1.235509
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with --tls-verify             1.400528
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout               1.544050
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with --cert-dir               1.557881
  Podman login and logout podman manifest with --authfile               1.690334
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with flag --authfile          2.382855
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with repository with fallback         2.430686
  Podman login and logout podman login and logout with multi registry           3.219892
  < Exit [SynchronizedAfterSuite] TOP-LEVEL - /home/pholzing/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/test/e2e/common_test.go:237 @ 06/05/26 13:20:39.286 (119ms)
  << Timeline
------------------------------

Ran 14 of 2515 Specs in 7.201 seconds
SUCCESS! -- 14 Passed | 0 Failed | 0 Pending | 2501 Skipped
```

So something is strange on main and this branch seems to behave much better and faster so this is good
